speaker: speaker2
text: I ’ m worried about my daughter . She can ’ t decide about college .

speaker: speaker1
text: Don ’ t worry . That ’ s just a part of being a teenager .

speaker: speaker2
text: I don ’ t mind that . But she disagrees with me about everything .

speaker: speaker1
text: You should encourage her to make up her mind by herself . You shouldn ’ t affect her decision .

speaker: speaker2
text: But I just want to give her some tips .

speaker: speaker1
text: Oh , she can make her own decisions .

speaker: speaker1
text: Believe me . Everything will be ok .
